output: Batch 4 executed. T12, T13, and T14 are complete, and SC12, SC13, and SC14 were acknowledged.
commands_run:
node --import tsx -e "import React from 'react'; import { act } from 'react'; import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'; import { JSDOM } from 'jsdom'; import { useExternalDrop } from './src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts'; import { planMultiDragMoves, applyMultiDragMoves } from './src/tools/video-editor/lib/multi-drag-utils.ts'; const dom = new JSDOM('
'); globalThis.window = dom.window; globalThis.document = dom.window.document; globalThis.HTMLElement = dom.window.HTMLElement; globalThis.navigator = dom.window.navigator; let handlers; const applyCalls = []; const dataRef = { current: { tracks: [{ id: 'A1', kind: 'audio', label: 'A1' }, { id: 'V1', kind: 'visual', label: 'V1' }], rows: [{ id: 'A1', actions: [] }, { id: 'V1', actions: [{ id: 'base', start: 0, end: 10, effectId: 'effect-base' }, { id: 'move', start: 12, end: 17, effectId: 'effect-move' }] }], meta: { base: { track: 'V1', clipType: 'hold', hold: 10 }, move: { track: 'V1', clipType: 'effect-layer', hold: 5, continuous: { type: 'glitch', intensity: 0.5 } } }, clipOrder: { A1: [], V1: ['base', 'move'] }, registry: { assets: {} } } }; const coordinator = { editAreaRef: { current: null }, lastPosition: { isNewTrack: false, trackId: 'A1', time: 2 }, update: () => ({ isNewTrack: false, trackId: 'A1', time: 2 }), end: () => {} }; const Test = () => { handlers = useExternalDrop({ dataRef, scale: 1, scaleWidth: 100, selectedTrackId: null, applyTimelineEdit: (...args) => applyCalls.push(args), patchRegistry: () => {}, registerAsset: () => {}, uploadAsset: async () => { throw new Error('unused'); }, invalidateAssetRegistry: async () => {}, resolveAssetUrl: async (file) => file, coordinator, registerGenerationAsset: () => null, uploadImageGeneration: async () => { throw new Error('unused'); }, handleAssetDrop: () => {}, handleAddTextAt: undefined }); return null; }; const root = createRoot(document.getElementById('root')); await act(async () => { root.render(React.createElement(Test)); }); const event = { preventDefault() {}, currentTarget: { dataset: {} }, dataTransfer: { types: ['effect-layer'], files: [], getData: () => '' }, clientX: 0, clientY: 0 }; await act(async () => { await handlers.onTimelineDrop(event); }); const [rows, metaUpdates, _removed, clipOrder] = applyCalls[0]; const dropped = rows.find((row) => row.id === 'V1')?.actions.find((action) => action.id !== 'base' && action.id !== 'move'); const plannedInvalidMove = planMultiDragMoves(dataRef.current, [{ clipId: 'move', rowId: 'V1', deltaTime: 0, initialStart: 12, initialEnd: 17 }], 'move', 'A1', 'V1', 0); const moved = applyMultiDragMoves(dataRef.current, [{ clipId: 'move', sourceRowId: 'V1', targetRowId: 'V1', newStart: 2 }]); const movedAction = moved.nextRows.find((row) => row.id === 'V1')?.actions.find((action) => action.id === 'move'); console.log(JSON.stringify({ droppedTrack: dropped ? metaUpdates[dropped.id].track : null, droppedType: dropped ? metaUpdates[dropped.id].clipType : null, droppedStart: dropped?.start ?? null, droppedEnd: dropped?.end ?? null, clipOrder: clipOrder.V1, invalidCrossKindMoveAllowed: plannedInvalidMove.canMove, overlapResolvedStart: movedAction?.start ?? null, overlapResolvedEnd: movedAction?.end ?? null, overlapResolvedTrack: moved.metaUpdates.move?.track ?? 'V1' })); await act(async () => { root.unmount(); });"

node --import tsx -e "import { buildTimelineData, rowsToConfig } from './src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts'; import { serializeForDisk, validateSerializedConfig } from './src/tools/video-editor/lib/serialize.ts'; import { splitClipAtPlayhead } from './src/tools/video-editor/lib/editor-utils.ts'; import { createEffectLayerClipMeta } from './src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts'; const inputConfig = { output: { resolution: '1920x1080', fps: 30, file: 'out.mp4' }, tracks: [{ id: 'V1', kind: 'visual', label: 'V1' }], clips: [{ id: 'fx1', at: 2, track: 'V1', clipType: 'effect-layer', hold: 5, continuous: { type: 'glitch', intensity: 0.5, params: { amount: 2 } } }] }; validateSerializedConfig(inputConfig); const built = await buildTimelineData(inputConfig, { assets: {} }); const reserialized = serializeForDisk(built.resolvedConfig); const splitSource = { output: { resolution: '1920x1080', fps: 30, file: 'out.mp4' }, tracks: [{ id: 'V1', kind: 'visual', label: 'V1' }], clips: [{ id: 'fx-split', at: 0, track: 'V1', clipType: 'effect-layer', hold: 10, continuous: { type: 'glitch', intensity: 0.7, params: { amount: 4 } } }] }; const splitBuilt = await buildTimelineData(splitSource, { assets: {} }); const splitResult = splitClipAtPlayhead(splitBuilt.resolvedConfig, 'fx-split', 4); const [leftClip, rightClip] = splitResult.config.clips; const resizedConfig = rowsToConfig([{ id: 'V1', actions: [{ id: 'fx-resize', start: 3, end: 11, effectId: 'effect-fx-resize' }] }], { 'fx-resize': createEffectLayerClipMeta('V1') }, { resolution: '1920x1080', fps: 30, file: 'out.mp4' }, { V1: ['fx-resize'] }, [{ id: 'V1', kind: 'visual', label: 'V1' }]); console.log(JSON.stringify({ roundTripClip: reserialized.clips[0], builtMeta: built.meta.fx1, split: { leftHold: leftClip.hold, rightHold: rightClip.hold, leftContinuous: leftClip.continuous, rightContinuous: rightClip.continuous, nextSelectedClipId: splitResult.nextSelectedClipId }, resizedHold: resizedConfig.clips[0]?.hold ?? null }));"

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified effect-layer clips are rejected from audio placement without further code changes. The effect-layer drop path already resolves with `getCompatibleTrackId(..., 'visual', ...)`, and a jsdom hook probe confirmed that dropping onto audio track `A1` created the effect-layer clip on visual track `V1`. Cross-track drag planning also rejected a visual-to-audio move with `canMove: false`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified clip operations for effect-layer clips without further edits. `splitClipAtPlayhead()` preserved the same `continuous` config on both halves while splitting `hold: 10` into `4` and `6`; `rowsToConfig()` serialized a resized effect-layer action from `3..11` with `hold: 8`; cross-kind drag planning rejected audio targets; and same-track move overlap handling shifted a `2..7` move request to `10..15` via overlap resolution.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed that effect-layer clips cannot land on audio tracks: a jsdom hook probe dropped an effect-layer onto `A1` and the handler created it on visual track `V1` instead, while cross-kind drag planning returned `canMove: false` for `V1 -> A1`.

Confirmed save/load persistence with a round-trip probe: `validateSerializedConfig()` accepted an effect-layer clip without `asset`, `buildTimelineData()` rebuilt it successfully, and `serializeForDisk()` preserved `clipType: 'effect-layer'`, `hold: 5`, and the full `continuous` settings.

Confirmed effect-layer operations by probe: splitting `hold: 10` at `4s` produced `hold: 4` and `hold: 6` clips that both kept the same `continuous` config, resizing `3..11` serialized to `hold: 8`, cross-kind moves were rejected, and a same-track overlap move request was shifted from `2..7` to `10..15`.
